content.en:
"Lords of the Legendary Realm of the True Saintless Land, why did they come to me?"

The Blackwater Lord frowned.

Although there are no powerful Legendary Realm Lords in the True Saintless Holy Land, there are enough Legendary Realm Lords, after all, it is an incomparably ancient Sacred Land-level power, and the heritage still exists.

Although he is not afraid of the True Immortal Land, he does not want to provoke them!

After all......

"Let the clone take care of it!"

The Blackwater Lord decided.

He has two major clones, which are enough to deal with these things, and the main body will definitely not make a move unless there are special circumstances.

Outside Blackwater Mountain.

The clone of the Lord of Blackwater tore through the long river of time and stopped these Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land.

The Black Water Lord's gaze looked at the True Spirit Lord, and he was suddenly a little surprised.

The strength of the True Spirit Lord is not much worse than him, he is a very old legendary lord, and he has always been careless, usually the Dragon Gu Lord handles affairs, but he didn't expect it to come out now.

"Everyone, what are you doing in my Heishui Mountain, and you still have a murderous intent, when did I offend you?"

The Blackwater Lord asked.

Lord Longgu said: "Lord of Blackwater, your Blackwater Mountain has gone too far, and you have even sent a top Transcendental Realm Lord to kill a large number of legendary lords of our True 150 Saintless Land and rob a large number !!of resources, this is a provocation to our True Saintless Land!"

"How is that possible?"

The Blackwater Lord was stunned.

How could it be that the legendary lord of Blackwater Mountain attacked a territory of the True Sacred Land.

"Which Transcendental Legendary Lord did it?"

The Blackwater Lord asked.

"You Beiyun Lord of Blackwater Mountain!"

The Frostless Lord said.

"We are looking into time and space, this matter cannot be wrong!" Lord Longgu said resentfully.

"I'll personally capture Lord Beiyun and confront you!"

The Black Water Lord grasped the void and directly grabbed the Bei Yun Lord, that is, Ye Tian's copy body, from the Black Water Mountain

Ye Tian naturally knew what was going on, but he pretended not to know anything.

The Black Water Lord wanted to directly spy on Ye Tian's past, but he couldn't, and his face was gloomy, and he had a bad idea.

Then.

Lord Longgu asked, "Lord Beiyun, you were the one who attacked and killed our territory of the True Sacred Land, right?"

Ye Tian directly panicked: "I did it on the orders of the Lord of Blackwater, it has nothing to do with me!"

The Lord of Blackwater was confused, when did he let Lord Beiyun do this?

The next moment.

Ye Tian directly annihilated this replica body, in the eyes of outsiders, Lord Bei Yun directly extinguished this clone, it must be a clone, otherwise how dare he directly annihilate the body like this?

The face of the Black Water Lord was extremely gloomy, he knew that he had been trapped, and immediately tried to lock the main body of the Lord of Beiyun, but he couldn't lock it, and everything couldn't be detected.

There is a legend that the Lord of the Realm has shielded Lord Beiyun's past, and he can't locate Lord Beiyun.

In other words, Lord Beiyun actually took refuge in other Legendary Realm Lords and deliberately tricked him, causing him to conflict with the True Saintless Land.

Interpretation?

How can this be explained?

I can't explain it!

The Legendary Realm Lords of the True Unholy Land spied into time and space and confirmed that it was Lord Bei Yun who did it, and Lord Bei Yun took the initiative to admit it, saying that it had nothing to do with him, and the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Unholy Land would not believe it!

"Lord Blackwater, you are too arrogant, don't you think that if we really have no Holy Land and no Peak Legendary Realm Lord, no one can help you?"

The True Spirit Lord was also furious.

"Do it!"

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords made a move, besieging this clone of the Black Water Lord.

In an instant, the Blackwater Lord fell into disadvantage

Immediately, the second doppelganger of the Blackwater Lord came.

The two clones came, but they were still no match for the many Legendary Realm Lords of the True Sacred Land, because these Legendary Realm Lords all came with at least two clones, and the combined Legendary-level combat power was as high as double digits.

And.

The battle is getting closer and closer to Blackwater, and if this happens, Blackwater Mountain will inevitably be affected.

"No, the main body must join the fight!

The Blackwater Lord decided.

His body has not made a move for a long time, and his combat power is much stronger than his body's combat power, so he can first resist these Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land, and then invite some other Legendary Realm Lords to talk peacefully before he can solve this problem.

Wow!

The main body of the Black Water Lord came out of the Void River Boundary Array, fighting with the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land.

The Lord of Blackwater originally wanted to pull the battlefield into the long river of time, but the Lords of the Legendary Realm of the True Saintless Land were not happy, but now the Lord of Blackwater's body has come out.

The Lords of the Legendary Realm of the True Void Sacred Land began their plans.

Airplanes!!!

A top-notch Median Eternal Arcana is offered.

One of the three eternal treasures of the True Sacred Land, the Ancient Mirror of Time and Space!

In an instant, the Ancient Mirror of Time and Space created a forbidden realm, trapping the three major bodies of the Black Water Lord and fighting with them.

Blackwater Mountain.

Ye Tian was summoned and immediately began to act.

As the Qinghuan Lord, he came to the nameless Black Mountain, and looked at the Void River Boundary Array.

He had already comprehended this great array, and immediately mobilized the power of the dripping water of time, penetrated this great array, and his body instantly entered it.

After entering the Void River Boundary Array, Ye Tian encountered the second Great Array.

"This should be the formation created by the Black Water Lord himself, let's call it the Black Water Great Array!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Black Water Great Array turned into endless black water, forming this place of the formation realm, once it passed through the Black Water Great Array, it would be spied on by the Black Water Lord, which was the second insurance of the Black Water Lord.

"It will definitely be discovered by the Black Water Lord, but I don't care about anything, I directly use the power to control time through the Black Water Array, and then leave quickly. The Lord of Blackwater is currently trapped by the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land, and even if he tries his best to get out of the trap, it will take some time!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Airplanes!!!!!

The power of time collided with the Black Water Great Array, forming a time channel, and Ye Tian crossed over in one step, passing through the Black Water Great Array.

Immediately, he came to the interior of the nameless Black Mountain where the Black Water Lord was retreating and cultivating.

In the void, three thousand kites floated there.

"Sure enough, there are three thousand kites!"

Ye Tian no longer hesitated, his body became incomparably larger, he grabbed the three thousand iris with one hand, and immediately quickly broke through the Black Water Great Array and the Void River Boundary Array, preparing to leave.

Outside Blackwater Mountain.

The trapped Blackwater Lord was furious, and he sensed that the Blackwater Great Array had been touched, and someone was going to snatch his three thousand kites.

Who is it?

The first thing he thought of was Lord Mofeng.

He didn't know that Lord Mofeng was dead, so he suspected that Lord Mofeng had planned all this, deliberately leading him to fight with the True Saintless Land, thus stealing the three thousand kites. _
